name: california-placer
description: Placer County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Placer County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Placer County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Placer County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Placer County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Placer County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-placer-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-placer-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The page contains a navigation menu with a specific link 'BOS Districts' (href='/8767/BOS-Districts') which likely leads to the detailed list of representatives.
The main content area is wrapped in 'bodyContainerTS' and 'bodyWrapper', but the actual representative list data is not visible in the provided truncated HTML snippet.
Image elements use relative URLs (e.g., '/ImageRepository/Document?documentID=...') requiring absolutization for the photoUrl field.
The HTML structure relies heavily on 'cpGrid' and 'cp-PopOver' classes, suggesting a dynamic CivicPlus CMS where data is often loaded via JavaScript after initial page load.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Placer County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Placer County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Placer County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Placer County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
